allowed_profile_classes.name: armor_self_check
allowed_profile_classes.notes: Used to review ARMOR source safety without expanding target scope.

allowed_profile_classes.name: quick_downloads_preflight
allowed_profile_classes.notes: Counts candidate files and directories without printing filenames or opening files.

allowed_profile_classes.name: quick_downloads_chunk
allowed_profile_classes.notes: Requires explicit batch index and bounded batch size.

safety_note: Policy review only. No files scanned, opened, moved, deleted, quarantined, or modified.
